caption: The video features a presentation at EuroPython 2018 in Edinburgh, focusing on a software interface called "CryptoManager." The presenter, dressed in a suit and standing behind a podium, explains the functionality of the CryptoManager module, which is part of a larger system for managing cryptocurrency data. The screen displays code snippets demonstrating how to import and use the CryptoManager class, including an example of sending tasks to retrieve cryptocurrency data such as Bitcoin and BitConnect values. The background of the slide is a network-like design, emphasizing the interconnected nature of cryptocurrency systems. The presentation appears to be aimed at developers or enthusiasts interested in cryptocurrency management and Python programming.
